area.value: one creature one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: For the duration of this spell, the subject ignores the adverse movement effects of difficult terrain, and can even take 5-foot steps in difficult terrain. Feather Step, Mass As feather step, except this spell affects multiple creatures. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide. Copyright 2010, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Author: Jason Bulmahn.
